posts.author: hmoreno789 (Heather Moreno)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to have the selected filters show at a glance on a dashboard so that a user doesn’t need to view the filter dropdown to see what is being filtered.

What are you trying to achieve

More user friendly so that it’s easier to see what you are looking at.
